subcodes.first_line: We bear witness that thou didst hearken unto the Call, didst draw nigh and attain unto the presence, and didst drink from the Kawthar of utterance from the hand of thy Lord, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نشهد انک سمعت الندآء و اقبلت و حضرت و شربت کوثر البیان من ید عطاء ربک الکریم
subcodes.subjects: @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
